step_rationale: Anchor for thromboxane pathway; aspirin-sensitive platelet activation amplification.
mechanism: 11-dehydroTxB2 is the stable urinary metabolite of thromboxane-A2, quantifying COX-1-driven platelet amplification in coronary thrombosis.

references.title: Aspirin resistance in off-pump coronary artery bypass grafting.
references.journal: European journal of cardio-thoracic surgery : official journal of the European Association for Cardio-thoracic Surgery
